name: Apple Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the apples into 1/2-inch wedges or 1/4-inch rings.
2. Coat the apple slices lightly with flour.
3. In a bowl, combine the flour, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
4. Add beer to the dry ingredients and beat until smooth.
5. Dip the apple slices in the batter, coating them well.
6. Fry the coated apples in oil heated to 375 degrees Fahrenheit for about one minute per side, or until golden brown.
7. Drain the fritters on paper towels.
8. Roll the fritters in sugar and cinnamon before serving hot.
